Class SimpleRoom

java.lang.Object
com.iohao.net.extension.room.SimpleRoom
All Implemented Interfaces:
Room
public class SimpleRoom extends Object implements Room
Default in-memory Room implementation.
Since:
21.8
Author:
渔民小镇
date:
2022-03-31
